## Group HackMD links — the facilitator records them here

As each group shares its note link during Part 2 (by **13:45**), the **facilitator**
adds one entry below, in this format:

```
Group: 03
Track: C — Rapid Prototyping for Knowledge Translation
Link: https://hackmd.io/your-note-link
```

Participants do not post here and need **no GitHub account** — they simply share their
link with the facilitator (on screen, or written down).

### Notes
- One entry per group. If a group edits its note afterwards, the link still works.
- Each group's HackMD note should be set so **anyone with the link can read** it.
- The facilitator exports every linked note to Markdown after the session and archives
  it under `submissions/`, with personal data removed.

---

*Facilitator: open this issue once, then **pin** it
(Issue → ··· → Pin issue). It is your own collection record — participants do not need
its URL, so there is no need to put it on the board or in the slides.*

*Disclaimer: a personal selection in the facilitator's own capacity; not the position of the University of Oxford (the employer) or the host; not legal advice.*
